channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bigsby scores 2 TDs as Jaguars show fight in 32-16 win over Patriots in London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Tank Bigsby rushed for 118 yards and two touchdowns and Parker Washington returned a punt 96 yards for a score in Jacksonville’s 32-16 comeback win over the New England Patriots on Sunday at Wembley Stadium. Rookie receiver Brian Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stones scores injury-time winner as Man City beats struggling Wolves 2-1 in Premier League
item.description: WOLVERHAMPTON, England (AP) — John Stones came up with an injury-time goal again as Manchester City narrowly avoided a major setback by beating last-place Wolves 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Santa Monica Ferris wheel to light up in support of Dodgers World Series push
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are knocking at the door of the World Series, and one of Los Angeles' most iconic landmarks will be decked out in blue to reflect the city's support.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Texas fans launch beer cans, other debris onto field after questionable call
item.description: Texas fans threw beer cans, water bottles and other objects onto the field on Saturday night, causing a chaotic scene in Austin against Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Saturday Night Five: BYU escapes, USC flops and kicking games implode as wild results highlight Week 8
item.description: The Cougars found a way to keep their perfect season alive while the Trojans found a new way to blow a fourth-quarter lead.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 5 Georgia knocks off No. 1 Texas 30-15, with Etienne running for 3 TDs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Trevor Etienne ran for three touchdowns, the first two set up by cornerback Daylen Everette's takeaways, and fifth-ranked Georgia went on to beat Quinn Ewers and No. 1 Texas 30-15 on Saturday night. Etienne's last score was a 1-yard plunge on fourth down with 12:04 left.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kadary Richmond talks expectations for senior season at St. John's
item.description: QUEENS, N.Y. (PIX11) – Kadary Richmond helped lead Seton Hall to an NIT Championship last season. He is now getting ready for his final year in the Big East, but this season he is suiting up to play for Rick Pitino at St. John’s. Watch the video player for more on this story.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies move to IMG Academy for final 2 regular-season games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies will play their final two regular-season matches at IMG Academy due to the impacts of Hurricane Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Former NFL player's Best Defense Foundation helps veterans at home
item.description: A former NFL linebacker, Donnie Edwards, created the Best Defense Foundation in 2018 to honor and celebrate war veterans.
item.dc:creator: Marielena Balouris, ABC 4

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ricky Pearsall returns to the 49ers practice for the first time since shooting
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall returned to the field for practice on Monday for the first time since he was shot in the chest during an attempted robbery nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles Clippers to make Intuit Dome debut Monday
item.description: For the first time in one quarter of a century, the Los Angeles Clippers will play a home game in their own, exclusive arena on Monday night. That's because the Intuit Dome, the $2 billion Inglewood arena, is now open seven years after it was first announced to be in the works.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Pro rider Cam Zink breaks ribs in hard fall during Red Bull Rampage mountain biking competition
item.description: Pro mountain biker Cameron Zink suffered six broken ribs and a punctured lung after a hard crash at Red Bull Rampage -- a particularly challenging freeride competition -- in southern Utah on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints
item.description: Baker Mayfield overcame three turnovers with 325 yards and four touchdowns passing, and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers defeated the New Orleans Saints 51-27 in what they hoped would be a morale boost to their many fans who endured Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
